message:
test(wave-67): trait coverage for hpack Header, Http1Config, OutputFormat, ColorChoice, DebugServerConfig

6 new tests covering Debug/Clone/Copy/Default/PartialEq/Eq derives across
http/h2/hpack, http/h1/server, cli/output, and web/debug modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
